reference: Am I going to die? I am almost fifteen. I have been constipated for as long as I can remember. I saw a doctor a few years ago; they advised me to eat healthier. I have been eating well: bran muffins and fruit. It has been easier to defecate lately. When I defecate, it feels like my rectum is hanging out of my anus. Do I have rectal prolapse? I am scared because I have been reading up about it but do not want to go to the doctors.
text: Am I gonna die? I am almost fifteen. I have been constipated for as long as I can remember. I saw a doctor a few years ago. He advised me to eat healthier. I have been eating well, bran muffins and fruit. It has been easier to defecate. When I defecate, feels like my rectum is hanging out of my anus. Do I have rectal prolapse? I am scared because I have been reading up about it, but do not want to go to the doctor.
